name: unicity-aos
description: Connect Codex to Unicity AOS, the operating system for agents, with governed tools, construction skills, policy hooks, and a principal-scoped identity.

interface.shortDescription: Build and operate agent systems on Unicity AOS.
interface.longDescription: Connects a principal-scoped Codex agent to Unicity AOS tools over MCP and adds the operating model, capsule authoring guide, proactive meta-harness world extension, health checks, and policy hooks.
defaultPrompt: Inspect my Unicity AOS system and explain what I can build.
Build a least-privilege capsule for this capability.
Notice and build useful extensions to this agent's AOS world while working.
